title: MK Ultra Gravel Athlete Result
description: Per-athlete result file committed via GitHub API after Strava activity submission

athleteId.description: Strava athlete ID (string, not integer, to avoid JSON precision issues)

name.description: Athlete display name (first + last from Strava profile)

gender.description: Self-reported gender category (from submission form, not Strava profile)

segments.description: Segment efforts keyed by Strava segment ID (string). Only segments with matching efforts are included.

elapsed_time.description: Elapsed time in seconds from Strava segment_effort
